docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,953.55 FILED BY LARCE, CHARITO AS TO DEFENDANT LARCE, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED AUG-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LARCE, ERIC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-01-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 25, 2013 AT 1:30PM FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-26-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE TO SEPTEMBER 25, 2013 AT 1;30PM. "THE AGREEMENT IS EXTENDED TO TWO MONTHS TO DECEMBER 4, 2013 1:30PM. THE JUNE 26, 2013 P/R DATE IS TO DETERMINE IF PLAINTIFF HAS DECIDED ON A COLOR FOR THE LUGGAGE THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO BUY FOR HER AND FOR DELIVERY OF THE LUGGAGE" PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
